paper_title: AgroNT: a foundational large language model for agriculture
pretraining_corpus: 48 edible plant species; approximately 10.5 million genomic sequences
selected_literature_result: Paper-reported splice-site AUROC 0.97/0.95; promoter R2 0.70/0.73; terminator R2 0.67/0.77; gene-expression R2 0.419-0.621
comparability_warning: Original-paper protocols only; not a same-split result for LegumeGenomeFM

paper_title: A DNA language model based on multispecies alignment predicts the effects of noncoding variants in plants
pretraining_corpus: 16 angiosperm genomes; balanced CDS/noncoding 512-bp windows with 256-bp step
selected_literature_result: Paper-reported Arabidopsis constraint validation AUROC/AUPRC 0.896/0.876 and maize transfer 0.829/0.797
comparability_warning: 512-bp model; literature result is not a long-context or legume-specific head-to-head

paper_title: PlantCAD2: A Long-Context DNA Language Model for Cross-Species Functional Annotation in Angiosperms
pretraining_corpus: 65 Phytozome angiosperm genomes; gene-centred +/-5-kbp regions chopped into overlapping 8,192-bp windows
comparability_warning: Preprint; gene-centred corpus and task splits differ from this project

paper_title: PlantCAD2: A Long-Context DNA Language Model for Cross-Species Functional Annotation in Angiosperms
pretraining_corpus: 65 Phytozome angiosperm genomes; gene-centred +/-5-kbp regions chopped into overlapping 8,192-bp windows
comparability_warning: Preprint; gene-centred corpus and task splits differ from this project

paper_title: PlantCAD2: A Long-Context DNA Language Model for Cross-Species Functional Annotation in Angiosperms
pretraining_corpus: 65 Phytozome angiosperm genomes; gene-centred +/-5-kbp regions chopped into overlapping 8,192-bp windows
selected_literature_result: Preprint Supplementary Table 2 masked-token accuracy 0.6569; G.max ACR AUPRC 0.5111; soybean expression binary AUROC 0.8538; SV AUROC/AUPRC 0.8452/0.8410
comparability_warning: Preprint abstract says 676M whereas Results/model naming says 694M; report preserves this internal inconsistency

paper_title: Nucleotide Transformer: building and evaluating robust foundation models for human genomics
pretraining_corpus: 850 genomes from a diverse species set
selected_literature_result: Paper reports top-k splice retrieval accuracy 96% and PR-AUC 0.98 for the 500M multispecies model
comparability_warning: Mostly human benchmark protocols; maximum raw bp follows the official model card

paper_title: Genome modelling and design across all domains of life with Evo 2
pretraining_corpus: OpenGenome2; 8.8 trillion tokens from 128,000 genomes across all domains of life
selected_literature_result: Nature paper reports broad zero-shot functional/variant tasks; PlantCAD2 preprint reports Evo-2-7B plant-task values under its own protocol
comparability_warning: Huge general model; plant/legume pretraining exposure must be audited per test species and full fine-tuning may be infeasible

paper_title: Genome modelling and design across all domains of life with Evo 2
pretraining_corpus: OpenGenome2; 8.8 trillion tokens from 128,000 genomes across all domains of life
selected_literature_result: Largest Evo 2 checkpoint reported in the Nature paper
comparability_warning: Not guaranteed feasible on 2-3 H20 96-GB GPUs; include only after a measured runtime gate

paper_title: DNA language models are powerful predictors of genome-wide variant effects
input_encoding: single nucleotide convolutional masked language model
comparability_warning: Short-context and Brassicales-specific; useful as a specialist control, not a universal long-context baseline

paper_title: HyenaDNA: Long-Range Genomic Sequence Modeling at Single Nucleotide Resolution
selected_literature_result: Published long-context GenomicBenchmarks and species-classification results
comparability_warning: Long-context architectural control; not plant-pretrained and checkpoint-specific sizes must be pinned

paper_title: Caduceus: Bi-Directional Equivariant Long-Range DNA Sequence Modeling
comparability_warning: Architecture control; not plant-pretrained and no 256-kbp native checkpoint in the cited study
